item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p02","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":false,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant directly adds another submission-page reminder and placement suggestion.
